name: @cairnkeep/memory-server
description: Durable, harness-agnostic memory MCP server for coding agents — the core of Cairnkeep.

scripts.test:smoke: npm run build && npm run check:embeddings && npm run check:extract && npm run check:scope-guard && npm run check:http-guard && npm run check:explore-guard && npm run check:explore-cache && npm run check:route-guard
scripts.test:search: npm run build && npm run check:search
scripts.test:memory: npm run build && npm run check:embeddings && npm run check:extract && npm run check:search
